blocks.content: In this milestone, you verify that ongoing instrumentation is correctly enabled for your namespace. This confirms that new services will be automatically captured.
In the **Manage** tab, click the **gear icon** next to your namespace to reopen settings.
Confirm the **Ongoing Instrumentation** toggle is switched **On**.
Optionally, if you have a test deployment you can create, deploy a new service to the namespace and wait 1-2 minutes. The service should appear in Application Observability automatically.

| What to check | Expected result |
|---------------|------------------|
| Namespace settings | Ongoing Instrumentation toggle is **On** |
| New deployments (if tested) | Automatically appear in Application Observability |

Ongoing instrumentation is now enabled. New services deployed to this namespace will be automatically instrumented with your configured settings.

In the next milestone, you'll celebrate your achievement and explore next steps.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Application Observability](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/application-observability/)
- [Service inventory](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/application-observability/manual/inventory/)

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following topics if you need help:

- [Manage instrumentation and settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#manage-instrumentation-and-settings)
- [Application namespace settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#application-namespace-settings)
- [Troubleshoot Kubernetes Monitoring](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/kubernetes-monitoring/configuration/troubleshooting/)
